title: Swamp Dragon only takes Atk damage

card.rawText: This creature can only be damaged by Atk damage.

effect.value: Only Atk damage can damage this creature

plan.title: Swamp Dragon only takes Atk damage
plan.summary: Put Swamp Dragon on the field and verify the headless route recognizes its static damage-type immunity rule.

notes: Set Swamp Dragon as player_1 primary creature.
This fixture isolates the printed damage filter: only Atk damage can damage Swamp Dragon.

steps: Set Swamp Dragon as player_1 primary creature.
Accept the while-on-field damage-type immunity static rule.
manualVerification: Confirm non-Atk damage effects do not damage Swamp Dragon while Atk damage still can.
riskNotes: This fixture validates static-rule recognition, not a full non-Atk damage application attempt.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Swamp Dragon's continuous Atk-damage-only filter.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
